# Iterable Insiders: A New Era of Customer Advocacy, Community, and Influence - Iterable

## Iterable Insiders: A New Era of Customer Advocacy, Community, and Influence

**Published by**

December 2, 2025

![Introducing Iterable Insiders image](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Introducing-Iterable-Insiders.png)

Marketing is evolving faster than ever, and so are the expectations placed on the leaders behind today’s most innovative customer experiences. At Iterable, we’ve always believed that our community of marketers, builders, and lifelong learners is at the heart of that innovation.

That’s why we’re excited to unveil **Iterable Insiders**, a community program designed for forward-thinking marketers shaping the next era of customer engagement.

Formerly known as Marketing Masters, this refreshed program is designed to better celebrate, empower, and elevate the voices shaping the future of marketing. Whether you’re a longtime customer or an Iterable alum _(former customer)_, Iterable Insiders opens the door to new opportunities to grow your skills, expand your influence, and directly shape our product’s evolution.

### Why the Change?

Marketing Masters created meaningful connections and surfaced passionate advocates—but we knew we could do more.

Marketers today want:

*   More opportunities to grow their personal brand
*   More meaningful ways to collaborate with technology partners
*   More direct influence on product direction
*   And a community that feels active, modern, and built for how they work today

Iterable Insiders was created to deliver exactly that. With expanded membership, clearer pathways to grow your advocacy, and a tiered system that rewards engagement, this new program is intentionally built to meet marketers where they are—and help them go even further.

### What Is Iterable Insiders?

Iterable Insiders is an exclusive, tiered community for our most engaged users and alumni—those who want to collaborate with Iterable, champion innovation, and amplify their personal brand through advocacy.

Whether you’re looking to share your expertise, speak at events, influence the product roadmap, or connect with other industry leaders, this program gives you a platform to shine.

Insiders can expect opportunities to:

*   **Shape the Future of Iterable:** Gain access to product teams, beta programs, and forums where your ideas influence what we build next.
*   **Expand Your Professional Network**: Meet marketers from across industries, share best practices, and join curated networking experiences.
*   **Elevate Your Personal Brand:** Speak at events, contribute content, get featured on our channels, and build visibility as a trusted voice in the industry.
*   **Be Recognized for Your Impact:** Earn badges, showcase your achievements, and unlock tier-specific benefits as you grow your involvement.

### A Tiered Experience Designed for Growth

Every Insider begins the year at the Member level—the starting line of your advocacy journey. As you participate in activities throughout the year, you can advance through higher tiers and unlock even more exclusive benefits.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Iterable-Insiders-Badges.png)

**Member**

**Silver**

**Gold**

**Platinum**

*   An official badge on your Iterable Plaza profile
*   Access to introductory opportunities to begin building your personal brand
*   Eligibility to advance into higher tiers throughout the year

*   A discounted Activate Summit ticket
*   Access to the private Slack channel
*   Speaking opportunities to grow your personal brand
*   Invite-only quarterly chats with Iterable’s product team
*   Exclusive Beta invitations

*   All Silver tier benefits plus…
*   A complimentary Activate Summit pass
*   Elevated onsite experience at Activate Summit
*   Professional headshot
*   Exclusive Gold status gift

*   All Gold tier benefits plus…
*   A chance to win a fully-expensed trip to Activate Summit & VIP dinner
*   Reforge membership for advanced professional development
*   Exclusive Platinum status gift
*   Featured recognition as an industry leader on the Iterable demo center page

### Step Inside. Your Journey Starts Here.

If you’re a marketer who wants to grow your influence, build your network, sharpen your skills, and help shape the future of customer engagement, Iterable Insiders is built for you.

This community isn’t just about recognition. It’s about creating tangible opportunities to accelerate your career and make a meaningful impact on the future of marketing and the Iterable platform.

Are you ready to join a community of innovative marketers, thought leaders, and advocates shaping what’s next?

**Apply to join Iterable Insiders** **here****.**

We can’t wait to see what you’ll bring to the community—and what we’ll build together.
